title: citrus × aurantium subf. ampullacea
intro: Citrus × aurantium subf. ampullacea, commonly known as bitter orange, is a plant species in the Rutaceae family that is a hybrid of Citrus aurantium and another citrus species. It has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects, making it a valuable herb in traditional medicine. The health benefits of Citrus × aurantium subf. ampullacea include reducing anxiety and stress, improving digestion, and lowering cholesterol levels, among others. The plant is often prepared in herbal teas, infusions, and essential oils, as well as being used in traditional Chinese medicine and Ayurvedic medicine.
